.file-embed.background: rgb(55, 55, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(0, 146, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(43, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(18, 97, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
